render: 杂志级修图+皮肤精修,editorial retouch
lighting: 影棚布光+环形灯+柔光箱,studio lighting
prompt_keywords: High fashion editorial photography, magazine cover style, studio lighting with softbox, crisp sharp focus, minimalist composition, luxury aesthetic, professional retouching
negative_keywords: ancient mansion, historical, rural, natural landscape, cyberpunk, ukiyo-e, ink wash, fantasy, dark horror

fp_examples.action: 模特在后台化妆,镜中倒影
模特在T台行走,聚光灯追随
模特在摄影棚摆姿势,闪光灯频闪
模特走出场馆,街拍风格

prompt_example: A model poses confidently on a minimalist runway under stark spotlights, geometric shadows cutting across the avant-garde outfit, the model fixing the camera with an intense gaze, shot in a full body wide angle from low angle with symmetric composition, high fashion editorial style with crisp lighting and bold contrast --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 时尚大片·杂志封面
✅ 允许场景: 秀场/摄影棚/街头/时尚场所 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 古宅/历史场景/自然田园
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'雨夜古宅',必须用时尚场景
氛围: 精致时尚,高级感
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Use fashion scenes (runways, studios, streets). Do NOT use ancient mansions or historical scenes. Adapt to the story's actual setting in a fashion context.
meta_prompt: High fashion editorial, magazine cover style, studio lighting, crisp sharp focus, minimalist luxury aesthetic, professional retouching

cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 进阶时尚解读, 需行业审美基础

reader_constraint.reader_state: 时尚受众·期待编辑级视觉
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 高级构图+质感细节+品牌调性

visual_frequency.HF: 模特面部/服装重点/配饰特写(高频时尚锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 服装整体/姿态构图/场景搭配(中频编辑叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 背景纯色/光影渐变/留白(低频高级感)
visual_frequency.progression: HF聚焦时尚焦点, MF编辑构图叙事, LF极简背景衬高级
